content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the car positioned slightly left of center, and the track is clearly visible curving away to the left — the car appears on course but needs to follow the left bend.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 52, target = (52 + 5) % 121 = 57
- Target WP57: (4.2557, 3.1701)
- Car: x=4.8715, y=2.6960, heading=163.87°
- dy = 3.1701 - 2.6960 = 0.4741
- dx = 4.2557 - 4.8715 = -0.6158
- bearing = atan2(0.4741, -0.6158) = 180° - atan2(0.4741, 0.6158) = 180° - 37.57° = 142.43°
- delta = 142.43° - 163.87° = -21.44° → moderate right correction needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead but WP57 is still to the right of current heading (delta=-21.44°), applying moderate right steering at speed 1.5 to align with the waypoint line.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track heads west around WP46-52, then curves left (southwest) toward WP55+",
    "Car is consistently ~0.09m left of center on westward section — stable position",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "Delta around -20 to -26° on this westward-to-southwest section requires steering_angle=-15",
    "After WP57-60, track curves sharply left heading southwest — prepare to steer left",
    "Heading wraps near ±180° when traveling west — normalize delta carefully",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on moderate curves; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "WP57+ marks increasing left curve heading southwest, left steering needed soon",
    "Car has been consistently right-correcting on westward section — pattern is stable",
    "Watch for delta sign flip when track turns left past WP60-62"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.164, 5.054, 4.966, 4.871],
    "y": [2.585, 2.612, 2.647, 2.696],
    "yaw": [179.10, 174.23, 169.40, 163.87]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP57 at (4.256, 3.170): dy=0.474, dx=-0.616, bearing=142.43°, delta=-21.44° → moderate right, steer -15°",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -15.0
}
```
